prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is H-101 Condenser/heat pump setting within 2.3 HVAC-R. The relevant subcategory is 2.3.1 Equipment Installation. The observed field condition is: pad not level (oil return). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors mfr install manual, IMC/IRC M1401. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T3 H-101 Measurement & estimation
